claim_limit: This policy reduces duplicate operational replay, not certificate production. Every UNSAT still requires the runner's exact-CNF external drat-trim replay. Classification completion still requires exhaustive aggregate replay before any parent or theorem claim.

operational_independent_audit.rule: Deterministic SHA-256 sample stratified by fifth-position quartile and bound to each immutable segment manifest.
stop_conditions: Any sampled proof hash or external replay failure

reason: Segment 0 showed that duplicate independent reconstruction/replay is the throughput bottleneck: production took 272.59 seconds, while a 32/256 second-audit sample took 39.27 seconds. All 256 production proofs already passed exact-CNF drat-trim; all 32 independently sampled proofs passed a second reconstruction/replay.
